extension.description: Database management tool for VS Code — browse schemas, run queries, and inspect data across PostgreSQL, MySQL/MariaDB, Redis, ClickHouse, and SQLite.
view.connections.name: Connections
view.queryHistory.name: Query History
config.defaultPageSize.description: Default number of rows per page when viewing table data.
config.safeMode.description: Safe mode: auto-add LIMIT to SELECT queries without one, run EXPLAIN to detect Seq Scans.
config.safeMode.warn: Warn on Seq Scan, auto-add LIMIT (default)
config.indexHintThreshold.description: Minimum estimated row count to show missing index warnings. Tables smaller than this are ignored.
config.confirmEdits.description: Show SQL and ask for confirmation before saving inline edits to the database.
chat.description: Ask questions about your database schema, get SQL suggestions, and explore data.
chat.command.schema: Show schema overview for the active connection
chat.command.query: Generate a SQL query based on your description
chat.command.describe: Describe a table or view structure
config.queryHistoryLimit.description: Maximum number of query history entries to keep. Pinned entries are never evicted.
config.grafanaUrl.description: Grafana server URL for direct dashboard push (e.g., https://grafana.example.com).
config.grafanaApiKey.description: Grafana API key for pushing dashboards. Create a key with Editor role.
chat.command.chart: Generate a chart visualization from a query
config.diffRowLimit.description: Maximum number of rows to compare per table. Larger values use more memory.
